mapper.select: SELECT A.write_year, A.doc_type, A.doc_no, A.comp_id, A.equipment_id, A.equipment_mgmt_num, A.equipment_mf_spec, A.inspection_cycle, A.inspection_expiry_date, A.use_yn, B.equipment_nm FROM esg.tb_safety_mgmt_of_hazardous_machinery A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_equipment_info B ON A.equipment_id = B.equipment_id WHERE A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.equipment_id = #{equipmentId};
SELECT A.write_year, A.doc_type, A.doc_no, A.orgn_id, A.orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_safety_mgmt_of_hazardous_machinery_orgn A WHERE A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo};

SELECT A.write_year, A.doc_type, A.doc_no, A.doc_seq, A.inspection_date, A.inspection_valid_from_dt, A.inspection_valid_to_dt, A.next_inspection_date, A.use_yn FROM esg.tb_safety_mgmt_of_hazardous_machinery_inspections A WHERE A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} ORDER BY A.use_yn DESC, A.inspection_date DESC, A.inspection_valid_from_dt DESC, a.inspection_valid_to_dt DESC, a.doc_seq DESC;
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_no)::INTEGER, 0) + 1)::TEXT,5,'0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_safety_mgmt_of_hazardous_machinery WHERE write_year = #{writeYear}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_mgmt_of_hazardous_machinery ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, equipment_id, equipment_mgmt_num, equipment_mf_spec, inspection_cycle, inspection_expiry_date, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, #{equipmentId}, #{equipmentMgmtNum}, #{equipmentMfSpec}, #{inspectionCycle}, #{inspectionExpiryDate}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_safety_mgmt_of_hazardous_machinery SET write_year = #{writeYear}, doc_type = #{docType}, comp_id = #{compId}, equipment_id = #{equipmentId}, equipment_mgmt_num = #{equipmentMgmtNum}, equipment_mf_spec = #{equipmentMfSpec}, inspection_cycle = #{inspectionCycle}, inspection_expiry_date = #{inspectionExpiryDate}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE doc_no = #{docNo} AND write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_mgmt_of_hazardous_machinery_orgn ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, orgn_id, orgn_nm, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{orgnId}, #{orgnNm}, now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_safety_mgmt_of_hazardous_machinery_inspections WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_mgmt_of_hazardous_machinery_inspections ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, inspection_date, inspection_valid_from_dt, inspection_valid_to_dt, next_inspection_date, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{inspectionDate}, #{inspectionValidFromDt}, #{inspectionValidToDt}, #{nextInspectionDate}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT A.write_year, A.doc_type, A.doc_no, A.orgn_id, A.orgn_nm, A.created_at, A.created_by, A.updated_at, A.updated_by FROM esg.tb_safety_mgmt_of_hazardous_machinery_orgn A WHERE A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = #{docType};
